description: Nick and Jonas from the Solana Foundation discuss the latest updates, including the Helium Network's migration to Solana, new CLI features, and a proposed syscall for tracking network restarts.
topic_summary: The video covers the Helium Network's successful migration to Solana [t=14:56], new CLI commands for finding program addresses [t=63.8], and a proposed syscall to get the last restart slot [t=112.66]. It also highlights a new name service repository and RPC provider updates [t=206.51].
